reviews.review_description: I like the game. It just felt lacking in image resolution. Nothing to really complain or praise about it. The game delivers what it promises.
Simple and functional without many frills, but if you're looking for the same game we used to play on Facebook back when Boomers weren't the only people on Facebook…. this game is for you!
This seems like a simple game but it’s polished, has some great music, and is just a lot of fun to play.

Can’t believe this game doesn’t have more reviews! The leaderboards have a lot of players on them!  Tons of fun - like Tetris, connect four and those addicting mobile games combined into one relaxing and challenging experience.  Everything fits together so well - the varied photo environments, the music and sound effects (often unappreciated by indie devs), graphics and gameplay.  At this point it’s hard for indie gems on Quest to get their shot in the spotlight but I think this game is destined to slow-burn but eventually catch on fire just from word of mouth. Congrats to the dev!

By the way did I say it’s free? So yeah why wouldn’t you try it?

developer_response.body: Hey — Thank you for the great review! I'm glad you enjoyed the game. Reading stuff like this is what makes it worth :)

reviews.review_description: i enjoyed playing this only issues i have is the shop does not work for me just says downloading shop info please wait and nothing loads and the backgrounds could be higher resolution these issues can be remedied then would change my review to 5*
